from source import to_base

def test_to_base_reverses_result():
    """
    Test that to_base correctly orders digits.
    The buggy code appends digits instead of prepending,
    so to_base(31, 16) incorrectly returns 'F1' instead of '1F'.
    """
    assert to_base(31, 16) == '1F', "to_base(31, 16) should return '1F', not 'F1'"
